name: componentry-dithered-image
title: Dithered Image Particles
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Converts a caller-provided image into an error-diffused particle field with pointer repulsion and press ripples.

changes: Repointed the utility import; added stale-load protection, accessible naming, grid, ripple, DPR, and render-size caps, viewport and tab pausing, and an origin-aligned reduced-motion frame.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; added stale-load protection, accessible naming, grid, ripple, DPR, and render-size caps, viewport and tab pausing, and an origin-aligned reduced-motion frame.
modifications.reason: Retain the upstream image-to-particle effect without stale async writes or unbounded offscreen canvas work.
